chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-271 of 2024 (Mst. Sanam Rajper Vs. Province of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 1149/2024 (U/A) 2. For Orders on CMA No. 1150/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For Orders on CMA No. 1151/2024 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case. 20-03-2024. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, advocate for the petitioner. ******** 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3&4. The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the Mukhtiakar(s) concerned to change the Foti Khata for the property left by Farman Ali Rajper. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the foti khata for the property left by Farman Ali Rajper is not being changed by the Mukhtiarkar(s) concerned then the petitioner has the remedy to exhaust for redressal of her grievance by approaching the Revenue highups. Without exhausting such remedy approaching this Court directly, for the purpose is not appearing to be justified. Consequently, the instant Constitutional Petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed application. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
